title: Quadlet - use specifier for unescaped values for templated container name
body:
<!--
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - use un-escaped prefix and instance names for container name in a template
```

comments.body: Please explain the change in the commit or at least link directly to the issue where we discussed this. Today I remember the why but in the future I won't.
@Luap99 I added an explanation and a link in the commit comment.
